texto: Of all the injuries inflicted by racism on people of colour the most corrosive is the wound within the internalized racism that leads some victims at unspeakable cost to their own sense of self to embrace the values of their oppressors.
explicacao: Citação de H. Jack Geiger sobre temas ligados a lideranca. “Of all the injuries inflicted by racism on people of colour the most corrosive is the wound withi…” articula lideranca, prejudice, bigotry em registro de lideranca, com relevância para contextos como bigotry.
